text:
N0450C_LAST_ATMPTED_GDR_DT N0450C_LAST_ATMPTED_GDR_DT N0450C Date of Last Attempted GDR CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the date of the last attempt to do a gradual dose reduction (GDR) of
antipsychotic medication. effective 10/01/2017
693 N0450D_GDR_DOCD_CONTRA_SW N0450D_GDR_DOCD_CONTRA_SW N0450D GDR Physician Documented Contraindicated CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether a physician has documented a gradual dose reduction (GDR) as
clinically contraindicated.
